title: Saved-card checkout fails on iOS
summary: Tapping the pay/checkout button does nothing when a previously saved card is selected on the iOS app. Workaround: delete and re-enter the card. Fix in progress with payments vendor.

title: Valid promo codes rejected as 'invalid'
summary: Some non-expired promo/discount codes intermittently return 'invalid code' at the cart, more often on Safari. Suspected case-sensitivity + caching issue in the coupon service.

title: Duplicate charge / double authorization
summary: A small number of orders create two identical authorizations on the customer's card when the confirmation step is retried after a timeout. Under active investigation with the payment processor; manual refunds issued case by case.

title: Return-label generator returns 404
summary: The self-service return-label endpoint 404s for orders shipped via one carrier integration, blocking self-service returns. Customers must contact support for a manual label.

title: Push notification opt-out not respected
summary: Disabling push notifications in-app does not persist across app updates; users are re-subscribed and receive high notification volume. Fix scoped, not yet started.
